title: claoxylon indicum var. macrophyllum
intro: Claoxylon indicum var. macrophyllum, also known as the large-leaved claoxylon, is a plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae, characterized by its large, elliptical leaves and small white flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Claoxylon indicum var. macrophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
